EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} assigned the role "{object.new_value}" to the account {object.account.name} on entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} assigned the role "{object.new_value}" to the account {object.account.name} on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed a role of the account {object.account.name} on entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed a role of the account {object.account.name} on entity "{datafield4}" on vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed a role of the account {object.account.name} on vCenter host {event_src.host}
